---
title: "getMPOC_NRT.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-processor.html)

NRT MODIS-Aqua particulate organic carbon (POC) retrieval.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-mpoc-mpic-processor/scripts/MPOC/getMPOC_NRT.py >}}
```

:::
